article_meta.title: The headquarters of the Euroclear financial institute in Brussels Photograph: Nicolas Maeterlinck/Belga Mag/AFP/Getty Im

reasoning: Multiple failures: wrong/unsupported bias flags, one attribution violation, missed a key instance, and non-approved bias type labels.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Flagged Russia's position ('would amount to theft') which is clearly attributed to Russia, violating the attribution rule.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Items 1, 2, and 4 are not genuine author-prose bias or have faulty rationales; only item 3 targets real subjective framing though mislabeled.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed vague/anonymous assertion 'it is understood... Threats have been directed...' (unattributed claim) and generalized 'Ukrainian officials and experts acknowledge...' attribution.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Used non-listed labels ('Framing Bias', 'Selection Bias', 'Source Bias') and misapplied types; did not use approved categories like Subjective Qualifying Adjectives or Omission of Source Attribution.
